summary: Phase 3 Habit Tracker + Banner Analytics Enhancement testing complete. 18/18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: /habits page with habit-tracker-page testid, Daily Habits sidebar nav, Admin Settings Habits tab with full CRUD, Banner Analytics card showing Views/Dismissed/Dismiss Rate metrics. Minor backend fix applied: added habit_gate_locked field to admin signal-block-status response for consistency.

minor.issue: Missing habit_gate_locked field for admin users - FIXED by testing agent

issues: Onboarding Tour modal can overlay habit cards - minor visual overlap, dismissible

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/settings/banner-analytics/track - no auth required, tracks impression/dismiss events
GET /api/settings/banner-analytics - admin auth required, returns summary with impressions, dismissals, dismiss_rate, days_active
GET /api/habits/ - auth required, returns habits[], completions_today[], gate_unlocked, date
POST /api/habits/{id}/complete - marks habit done for today, returns already flag
GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/habits - full CRUD for admin habit management
signal-block-status now consistently returns habit_gate_locked field for all user types
AdminSettingsPage.jsx has tab-habits with HabitManagerCard component
BannerAnalyticsCard shows summary per banner_type with Views, Dismissed, Dismiss Rate, Days Active
seed_data_creation: Multiple test habits created during backend tests (will persist). Seeded habit exists: 99306d6a-5ac8-4d24-98ed-542aefcabcfd (Send 1 invite today, action_type: send_invite, is_gate: true)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Habit Tracker + Banner Analytics fully implemented and tested. Backend: habit_router routes at /api/habits/, admin routes at /api/admin/habits, banner analytics at /api/settings/banner-analytics/*. Frontend: /habits route with HabitTrackerPage, Admin Settings Habits tab (tab-habits), BannerAnalyticsCard in Banners tab. Gate habits block signal until completed (habit_gate_locked field in signal-block-status). Test habits created during testing may need cleanup.

verified_features.details: No auth required. Tracks impression/dismiss for notice_banner/promo_popup. Increments daily counters in DB.
Admin auth required. Returns summary per banner_type with impressions, dismissals, dismiss_rate, days_active. Also includes daily breakdown.
Auth required. Returns habits list, completions_today (list of completed habit IDs), gate_unlocked (bool), date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Auth required. Creates habit_completion record for today. Returns {message, already} where already=true if already completed.
Auth required. Deletes habit_completion record for today. Returns {message}.
Admin auth required. Returns all habits including inactive ones, sorted by created_at desc.
Admin auth required. Creates habit with title, description, action_type (send_invite/link_click/generic), action_data, is_gate.
Admin auth required. Updates habit fields.
Admin auth required. Soft-deletes by setting active=false.
Now includes habit_gate_locked field for all user types (admin/member). Gate habits block signal if no completion today.
Renders HabitTrackerPage with data-testid='habit-tracker-page'. Shows habits, completion toggle, gate status badge (locked/unlocked), copy message button for send_invite type.
Daily Habits nav item in sidebar with CheckSquare icon, navigates to /habits, has data-testid='nav-habits'.
Tab found via data-testid='tab-habits'. Shows HabitManagerCard with habit list, Add Habit button (data-testid='add-habit-btn'), habit form (data-testid='habit-form').
In Banners & Popups tab. Shows 30-day analytics with Views, Dismissed, Dismiss Rate (%), Days Active for notice_banner and promo_popup. Refresh button (data-testid='refresh-analytics').

fix_applied.description: Added habit_gate_locked: False to admin signal-block-status response for API consistency
fix_applied.reason: Admin users were getting response without habit_gate_locked field while regular users got it
